title: Vanilla - Chocolate Flakes Create
description: A modpack attempting to accumulate vanilla'ish mods that do not change feel of simplistic nature of minecraft allowing at the same time to have long play with friends. Targetted towards playing with friends and foes.
body:
Simplistic modpack trying to convey vanilla feeling with custom worldgen aiming to create long lasting world with no true end goal to play with friends. With addition on new weaponery and difficulty scalling to number of players it's goal is to achieve cooperation as well as conflicts. Destruction may be prevented with chunk claiming and teams.

Equipped with many QoL and Optimisation mods as well as shaders to allow playjng both on low spec and high end machines.

Pack is currently WIP and is aimed to be developed further by adding longplay features while not sacrificing feel and difficulty of vanilla'ish minecraft.
